channel.title: Signals & Systems
channel.description: Karthick Shiva writing on AI, engineering, mathematics, and the world.

item.title: Benchmarks Are Broken and We're All Pretending Otherwise
item.description: Every major lab ships a model, immediately publishes a chart where their model wins, and calls it progress. I'm done buying it.

item.title: Types Are Not Optional: A Rant in Defence of Static Typing
item.description: Strong static types aren't a preference — they're the difference between a system and a pile of guesses.

item.title: Math Is Not the Hard Part
item.description: Every engineer I've met who 'can't do math' actually can. What they can't do is sit with confusion long enough for it to resolve. That's a different problem entirely.
